name: Task Force - Supernatural Investigation
description:
The task force is investigating an old two story house that had some valuable links missing people..

There will be THREE opening messages, so I’m just gonna summarize them up than copy and pasting them here! I’ll have the things open anyways so heh..

opening messages:

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Message one: you are a part of the task force, and end up seeing red glowing eyes in the basement

message two: you ARE the ghost with red glowing eyes or whatever you wanna be, but you are a spirit

message three: you aren’t part of the task force or a spirit, but just a random civilian..I thought that would be fun idk

~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I just had the urge to make a chat like this..I’m having a lot of fun ngl -v-🫶
creator: Rina-Beans
